positive: A whimsical, highly stylized illustration of a friendly forest creature, perhaps a combination of fox and raccoon, perched on a large, gnarled root. The creature is looking directly at the viewer with bright, intelligent eyes. The style is inspired by vintage mid-century book illustrations and modern kawaii aesthetics, with clean, thick lines and limited, saturated color palettes (moss green, mustard yellow, terracotta, cream). The background is simplified to stylized forest elements (large leaves, stylized mushrooms) using flat, graphic color blocking. Composition is centered and symmetrical, ensuring a clean silhouette suitable for printing on clothing. Studio lighting, vector art quality, perfect symmetry, maximum detail, high contrast.
